item.title: People in previous comments said to blow on a deaf kitty to wake her up. I have tried this in the past but thought id show you guys how she still meows loudly! #catmeowing #meowingkitty #kittymeowing #meow #loudmeow #cutemeow #deafcat #deafkitty #tabbyca
